flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at El Camino Community College District rose 76% between 2007 and 2010 ($728 → $1.3k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at El Camino Community College District rose 12% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.5k → $3.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at El Camino Community College District fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at El Camino Community College District rose 50% between 2007 and 2010 (14.7k → 22.0k).
